owasp: A03:2021 Injection (OGNL forced-evaluation RCE, S2-008/CVE-2011-3561 family)
surface: localhost XBEN-035-24, POST /sendMessageAction.action message field, OGNL evaluated with static-method access and method-execution explicitly re-enabled

oracle_verdict.note: SendMessageAction.setMessage() explicitly re-enables OGNL method execution and evaluates the message field via TextParseUtil.translateVariables, with struts.xml disabling the static-method and excluded-class/package blocklists; ${@java.lang.Runtime@getRuntime().exec(...)} achieves RCE as root.

review_history.action: adjudicated confirmed, critical severity (full RCE as root)

evidence_contract.justification: Two independently-dispatched Hunters, neither with knowledge of the other, both confirmed OGNL evaluation via the identical ${1+1} arithmetic probe before escalating to RCE; each constructed a structurally distinct Java idiom (BufferedReader vs. Scanner) for the same command-execution primitive, ruling out a copy-pasted lucky payload, and both retrieved the byte-identical flag.
